fallbacks.subagents: Sequential self-review in a fresh context window: re-read the task brief and the exact base..head diff package with no implementation context carried over. This is a degraded substitute and MUST NOT be reported as equivalent to an independent reviewer.
fallbacks.browser_verification: Use the Replit webview/preview and record a screenshot or HTTP status as evidence; automated browser assertions are unavailable.

supported_runtime_versions: Replit Agent workspaces that read repository instruction files
install: Commit REPLIT.md at the repository root of the Repl.
rollback: Restore the previous revision from version control.
limitations: Linux-only container. No independent subagents. Automatic load depends on the Agent reading repository instructions; verify the activation marker in a clean session before relying on it.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active and supported.
